acceptanceCriteria: The #26-blocked sentence counts only the marketplace, seed-pipeline, and verified-local-clone paths and explicitly states the host-required CI path protects only the CI consumer and does not by itself unblock #26

The verifier paragraph states that the numeric repository ID, trigger event, and tag pattern are certificate-extension values not enforced by the enumerated gh CLI flags and must be checked from the verifier's certificate or JSON output
The host-required CI table row states the dependency that .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs remain byte-identical to the attested dist/rigor.cjs or become its own attested subject
The #25 negative-test list includes substitution of an archive with a mismatched detached release manifest (mix-and-match)
All GH-24-R2 acceptance criteria remain satisfied by the combined working-tree diff

The recorded required check (git-diff-check) passes; npm run test:all, npm run bench, and claude plugin validate . --strict are additionally rerun and reported in the pull request, not recorded as verification checks
constraints: documentation-only change: no source, workflow, CI-permission, repository-settings, key, release, or attestation change
do not claim any SLSA Build level, enforcement capability, or executed attestation smoke test
do not enable GitHub immutable releases or alter repository settings
self-merge only after presenting the reviewer findings; no release in this task; merge authorization was given by the human in-session and is restated in the pull request
